---
name: Review / Feedback
about: Give direct feedback on clarity, reproducibility, and hiring-readiness
title: "Review: "
labels: ["feedback"]
assignees: []
---

## First impression (10 seconds)
What did you think this repo is about?

## What’s unclear or weak
List what you would change first.

## Reproducibility check
Could you reproduce the main output quickly? If not, what blocked you?

## Hiring-readiness
If you were hiring a junior/associate, what is missing?

## Suggested edits
Write exact text or exact structure changes.
